subject: Fix issue SO failed to create VNF
commit_message:
Fix issue SO failed to create VNF

Failed with error message: Internal Error Occurred in CreateVnfInfra QueryCatalogDB Process

Issue-ID: SO-352

Change-Id: I7b370102f865a1eb3a07c49d5f4cfcda03391728
Signed-off-by: eyalholz <eyalh@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.oparent:oparent-odlparent:pom:1.0.0 needed for sub-project org.openecomp.so:MSOCommonBPMN:jar:1.1.1-SNAPSHOT: Failed to collect dependencies at org.openecomp.appc.client:client-kit:jar:1.2.0: Failed to read artifact descriptor for org.openecomp.appc.client:client-kit:jar:1.2.0. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-profile-java/722/ )
